text: The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.

SearchValues<T> in .NET 11 is the fast path for ContainsAny / IndexOfAny / IndexOfAnyExcept on ReadOnlySpan, but only when you store it in a static readonly field. Build it inside the hot method and you keep all the SIMD planning cost while losing the amortisation. Plus the StringComparison gotcha (only Ordinal / Invariant variants) and when the inversion trick with IndexOfAnyExcept beats string.TrimStart.

Every Claude Code session lives as a JSONL file under ~/.claude/projects/. jsonl-to-pdf converts one into a PDF you can attach to a PR, paste in Slack, or print. Sub-agents render nested inline at the right tool call. --redact strips AWS, GitHub, Anthropic, and OpenAI keys, Bearer headers, and PEM private keys before you share.
